CREATE TABLE `class_sessions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `institute_id` int NOT NULL,
  `class_id` int NOT NULL,
  `faculty_id` int NOT NULL,
  `session_token` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `start_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `end_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_2` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_3` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_4` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_5` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_6` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_7` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_8` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_9` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_10` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_11` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_12` (`session_token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `session_token_13` (`session_token`),
  KEY `institute_id` (`institute_id`),
  KEY `class_id` (`class_id`),
  KEY `faculty_id` (`faculty_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `class_sessions_ibfk_37` FOREIGN KEY (`institute_id`) REFERENCES `institutes` (`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `class_sessions_ibfk_38` FOREIGN KEY (`class_id`) REFERENCES `classes` (`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `class_sessions_ibfk_39` FOREIGN KEY (`faculty_id`) REFERENCES `faculty` (`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
